info.name: Acceldata - Data Observability Cloud API
info.description: The Acceldata Data Observability Cloud (ADOC) API provides programmatic access to data observability, data quality, pipeline monitoring, alerts, data lineage, and administration features. It enables enterprise teams to integrate Acceldata's observability data into custom workflows, dashboards, and automation pipelines.
